Notes: Kristen Caban and Maggie Farrell each had a game-high 16 points and Carly
Minehan added a double-double with 11 points and 10 rebounds.  Nicole Sarcone
had a solid game with 12 points, five rebounds and a game-high six assists.
Game.Officials: Drew Marino,  George Tully,  Henry Boldrin Jr.
